name: Real failure: InsightOS dashboard — tests component usage + text sizing
source: Real brainstorm output from 2026-03-31 that produced truncated text, empty chart rectangles, and 65% component coverage

input.userMessage: Brainstorm variations for a user insights dashboard with NPS score, CSAT rating, ticket count, trend chart, feedback sentiment, and recent feedback list

expectedBehaviors: Every text node has a sizing property — either { width: fill, height: hug } for body text or { width: hug, height: hug } for short labels
Library component coverage is >= 75% per variation
Navigation items use Button (Tertiary gray variant), not custom text frames
User profile in sidebar uses Avatar label group, not custom text + circle
Alert/warning banners use the Alert component with appropriate color variant
Feedback list uses Activity feed component or Table, not raw text frames
Chart containers have a title, axis labels, and background fill — NOT empty rectangles
Stat metric cards document why they are token-built (no library match) with $note
No text truncation possible — parent frames have width constraints, text nodes have fill sizing
Badge component used for status indicators (Critical, High, Medium)
antiPatterns: Text nodes without sizing property — causes 'User Insi' truncation
Empty colored rectangles labeled as charts with no title, legend, or structure inside
Buttons built as custom text frames instead of library Button component
User profile built as text + ellipse instead of Avatar label group
Alert banners built as colored frames with text instead of Alert component
Feedback items built as raw text frames instead of Activity feed component
Component coverage below 70% — rebuilding the design system instead of using it
Badge/status indicators built as colored text instead of Badge component
Navigation items without hover/active/focus states (means they're not real Buttons)

evaluationCriteria.textSizingCompleteness: Does EVERY text node in EVERY variation have an explicit sizing property?
evaluationCriteria.componentCoverage: Is library component coverage >= 75% in each variation?
evaluationCriteria.chartContainerQuality: Do chart areas have titles, labels, and fills — not empty rectangles?
evaluationCriteria.mandatoryComponentMapping: Are all mandatory patterns (buttons, avatars, alerts, feeds, badges) using library components?
evaluationCriteria.noTruncationRisk: Is there zero risk of text clipping? Every text has fill or hug, every parent has width?
